form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Double Lines at Tamworth over 1609m in a NR 35 to 38 on March 26 at $41. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Rainbow Jet at this track over 2160m in a NR 45 to 55 on April 5 at $51. Solid top-three prospects.
